About Me

Healthcare-focused, and equally open to data, business & BI analyst roles across industries

Hello, I'm Sravani Kadiyala

I'm a data and business-intelligence analyst with a Computer Science background, and I'm happiest when a messy spreadsheet turns into something a team can actually act on. I clean and model raw data, find the story inside it, and build dashboards that make the answer obvious — using SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI and Excel.

Healthcare is where my deepest work sits — patient no-show and readmission risk, care-gap and revenue-cycle insight — and I'm sharpening it through a healthcare data analytics externship with TruBridge. I've also built dashboards across six other industries (supply chain, finance, retail, SaaS, HR and marketing), so I pick up a new domain fast and ask the questions that matter to that specific business. I'm actively open to data analyst, business analyst, BI analyst, and healthcare data analyst roles — in healthcare or any industry where clear analysis drives the decision.
